rule.descr: Règle permettant au VPN de se connecter à la DMZ

alias.name: LAN_internet
alias.detail: Entry added Wed, 24 Sep 2025 09:07:29 +0000||Entry added Thu, 19 Mar 2026 12:58:41 +0000||Entry added Thu, 19 Mar 2026 12:58:41 +0000||Entry added Thu, 19 Mar 2026 12:58:41 +0000||Entry added Thu, 19 Mar 2026 12:58:41 +0000

revision.description: admin@20.0.20.2 (Local Database): User Manager Settings saved

package.name: OpenVPN Client Export Utility
package.descr: Allows a pre-configured OpenVPN Windows Client or Mac OS X's Viscosity configuration bundle to be exported directly from pfSense.

package.name: squid3
package.descr: High performance web proxy cache (3.4 branch). It combines Squid as a proxy server with its capabilities of acting as a HTTP / HTTPS reverse proxy.<br /> It includes an Exchange-Web-Access (OWA) Assistant, SSL filtering and antivirus integration via C-ICAP.

package.name: Zabbix Agent 6
package.descr: LTS (Long Term Support) release. Zabbix LTS releases are supported for Zabbix customers during five (5) years i.e. 3 years of Full Support (general, critical and security issues) and 2 additional years of Limited Support (critical and security issues only). Zabbix LTS version release will result in change of the first version number.<br /> Standard release. Standard Zabbix releases are supported for Zabbix customers during six (6) months of Full Support (general, critical and security issues) until the next Zabbix stable release, plus one (1) additional month of Limited Support (critical and security issues only). Zabbix Standard version release will result in change of the second version number.<br /> More info in <a href="http://www.zabbix.com/life_cycle_and_release_policy.php">Zabbix Life Cycle and Release Policy</a>.

package.name: squidGuard
package.after_install_info: Please visit Services - SquidGuard Proxy Filter - Target Categories and set up at least one category there before enabling SquidGuard. See https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/packages/cache-proxy/squidguard.html for details.

menu.name: Squid Reverse Proxy
menu.tooltiptext: Modify the reverse proxy server settings

menu.name: SquidGuard Proxy Filter
menu.tooltiptext: Modify the proxy server's filter settings

service.name: c-icap
service.description: ICAP Interface for Squid and ClamAV integration

config.name: Liste_LPFS
config.domains: tiktok.com youtube.com facebook.com twitter.com x.com instagram.com neverssl.com linkedin.com snapchat.com netflix.com twitch.com dailymotion.com primevideo.com
